displayTitle: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #1
synopsis: After she fails to eliminate the young Jedi Luke Skywalker, Mara Jade is dispatched to take down a crimelord who seeks to reestablish the criminal organization Black Sun. Little does she know that the Emperor's imminent date with death will change her life forever! Written by Timothy Zahn and Michael A. Stackpole, and illustrated by Carlos Ezquerra.
title: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #1
